task: Given a text description of a photo, return the primary content type ('subject' = one clear focus, or 'scene' = no single focus) and the secondary labels present, each with a confidence from 0 to 1.
primary_rule: Primary is decided by what the eye locks onto first. One spike of attention = subject. Attention spread flat = scene. Size only breaks ties.
label_rule: A secondary label is included only if the description states or forces it. Labels are never inferred from what usually co-occurs.

items.description: A golden retriever in sharp focus stands in a grassy field, with blurry mountains in the background.
A plate of pasta with a fork beside it, lit by soft light from a nearby window.
A busy city street at night, neon signs glowing, a taxi in traffic, and a few people walking.
A lone surfer stands on a wide, nearly empty beach, the ocean stretching out behind.
A messy room with an unmade bed, a desk, a guitar, and filled shelves on a wooden floor.
A red bicycle leaning against a plain wall.
Two friends sit across from each other at a cafe table, talking, both about equal size in the frame.
A vast savanna with a single small elephant far off in the distance.
items.notes: Tiny elephant, but it is the only thing the eye finds, so focus beats size: subject. Sky is left out because 'savanna' does not force it.

items.description: A holiday table crowded with many dishes filling the frame.
A green forest with one bright red tree standing out in the middle.
A soccer player mid-kick, with other players blurred in the background.
items.notes: The player is the focus, so subject. No outdoors or plant: 'soccer' never states where it is played, so we do not infer it.

items.description: A crowded farmers market with stalls of produce and shoppers browsing.
A close-up of a single coffee cup with latte art, the cafe blurred behind it.
A mountain lake at sunrise, the peaks reflected in the still water.
items.notes: Wide view with no single focus, so scene. Sky is included because 'sunrise' forces it: you cannot see a sunrise without sky.

items.description: A baby asleep in a crib under soft light, the nursery blurred behind.
Three street musicians on a corner with a guitar and drums, people stopped to watch.
items.notes: A group with no single point the eye lands on, so scene, even though the musicians are what the photo is 'about.' Outdoors because 'street' forces it.

items.description: A lone saxophone player under a single spotlight, the stage dark all around.
items.notes: One lit figure against a dark stage pulls the eye to one spot, so subject. Same ingredients as cap_16, opposite call.

items.description: A surfer riding a big wave, spray flying, water filling the frame.
items.notes: Water fills the frame, but the surfer is the lock, so subject. No outdoors: a wave does not force it, since indoor wave pools exist.

items.description: A city skyline at night with many lit windows, no single building standing out.
A swimming pool full of kids playing with floats, splashing in the water.
